basic_details.job_title: TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - 760 Vacancies | Apply Online @ NATS Portal

qualification.details: A regular full-time Degree in Engineering or Technology from a Statutory University in the relevant discipline. A regular full-time Degree in Engineering or Technology from an institution empowered by an Act of Parliament. An equivalent Graduate-level qualification from a professional body recognized by the State or Central Government. | A regular full-time Diploma in Engineering or Technology from a State Council/Board of Technical Education. A regular full-time Diploma in Engineering or Technology from a University in the relevant discipline. An equivalent Diploma recognized by the State or Central Government. | A regular full-time UGC-approved Degree in Arts/Science/Commerce/Humanities (BA/B.Sc./B.Com/BBA/BBM/BCA etc.) from a Statutory or Deemed University. | Candidates who completed their qualifying examination in 2022, 2023, 2024, or 2025 are eligible to apply. | Candidates must hail from Tamil Nadu. | Age limit will be followed as per the Apprenticeship Rules. | Candidates who have already undergone, or are currently undergoing, apprenticeship under the Apprenticeship (Amendment) Act 1973, or who have one year or more of work experience, are not eligible to apply. | Also Read: ISRO URSC JRF Recruitment 2026 – 17 Junior Research Fellow Posts, Apply Online by 11 July 2026

vacancy_details.Discipline: B.A. / B.Sc. / B.Com / BBA / BCA / BBM etc.

category_wise_vacancy.Discipline: B.A. / B.Sc. / B.Com / BBA / BCA / BBM etc.

selection_process: The Board of Apprenticeship Training (Southern Region) will prepare the shortlist based on the percentage of marks obtained in the basic qualifying examination relevant to each discipline. The selection process involves:
Shortlisting based on academic percentage/CGPA Email intimation to shortlisted candidates Certificate verification at PWD
Candidates must compulsorily enter their percentage of marks (or CGPA x 10) on the NATS portal; applications without this detail will not be considered.
how_to_apply: Visit the official NATS portal: nats.education.gov.in
Complete the registration form to generate a unique 12-digit Enrollment Number (ATN…)
After enrollment, log in with your email ID and password
If you've forgotten your password, click "Forgot Password" and reset it via your registered email
Log in and complete/verify your application form
Go to "Apply against advertised vacancies", search "Public Works Department Tamilnadu", and click "Apply"
Documents to Upload: B.E./B.Tech/BA/B.Sc./B.Com/BBA/BCA/BBM/Diploma Provisional Certificate or Consolidated Mark Sheet, with percentage of marks clearly mentioned.
Apply Online for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026

all_official_links.label: Apply Online for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026 through the NATS portal is 25 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Public Works Department (PWD), Tamil Nadu has announced 760 Apprentice vacancies for Graduate Apprentices, Technician (Diploma) Apprentices, and Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates from Tamil Nadu who completed their Degree or Diploma in the relevant discipline during 2022, 2023, 2024, or 2025 are eligible to apply, subject to the prescribed conditions

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered under TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹9,000 for Graduate and Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices, and ₹8,000 for Diploma Apprentices.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on academic marks/CGPA, followed by certificate verification for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of training in TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship training period under TN PWD Recruitment 2026 is one year.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for TN PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the NATS portal by registering, logging in, and applying for Public Works Department Tamilnadu before the closing date.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates who have already completed apprenticeship training apply?
faq.answer: No. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training, or who have one year or more of work experience, are not eligible.

faq.question: Q9. Does TN PWD Apprentice training guarantee a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. Completion of apprenticeship training under TN PWD does not guarantee employment or confer any right to claim a government job in the department.
